evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Proactively identify and resolve data quality issues; Add comprehensive metadata, documentation, lineage, ownership, definitions, data quality checks; managing metadata, documentation, data quality checks, and sensitive data masking
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour: quality checks, metadata, documentation, lineage, and masking dominate; no velocity language.
evidence.domain_risk: payment/GTM infrastructure; campaign reporting; funnel health; errors affect marketing efficiency but not financial reporting
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Moderate: SaaS/marketing domain; errors affect business decisions without regulatory/financial consequence.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Create trusted, self-serve datasets; robust data products; promote best practices; training and mentorship
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Mature: self-serve datasets, established practices, mentoring junior engineers, multiple GTM system integrations signal mature function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Create trusted, self-serve datasets and reporting layers; Proactively identify and resolve data quality issues; Partner with Marketing stakeholders to translate business questions into robust data products; Enable Marketing teams through documentation, training, office hours
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Hiring manager: specific data product ownership (datasets, quality resolution, stakeholder translation, enablement) shows domain expertise.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: campaign reporting; attribution analysis; funnel health; investment decision-making; GTM workflows; paid media; campaign tracking
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Commercial: primary focus on marketing ROI, campaign effectiveness, funnel conversion, and revenue operations decision-making.
evidence.autonomy_level: Create; Proactively identify and resolve; Partner with stakeholders; Enable teams; Activate data
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Execution: candidate owns defined analytics product delivery within marketing stakeholder partnership.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools or expected AI capability.
evidence.testing_framing: Proactively identify and resolve data quality issues; Add data quality checks; Knowledgeable in managing data quality checks
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Responsibility: data quality ownership with explicit responsibility for identification and resolution.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Proactively identify and resolve data quality issues; trusted, self-serve datasets; sensitive data masking
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: data quality and privacy (masking) concern secondary to marketing enablement and decision-making.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Create trusted, self-serve datasets; Improve and extend reporting layers; Partner to enhance data quality
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Fix/scale: improving and extending existing data infrastructure for GTM functions, not building from zero.
evidence.loss_aversion: Proactively identify and resolve data quality issues; Add comprehensive metadata to datasets; sensitive data masking.
